pkgmetadata.longdescription: Typing stubs for itsdangerousThis is a PEP 561 type stub package for the itsdangerous package.It can be used by type-checking tools like mypy, PyCharm, pytype etc. to check codethat uses itsdangerous. The source for this package can be found athttpsgithub.compythontypeshedtreemasterstubsitsdangerous. All fixes fortypes and metadata should be contributed there.Note The itsdangerous package includes type annotations or type stubssince version 2.0. Please uninstall the types-itsdangerouspackage if you use this or a newer version.See httpsgithub.compythontypeshedblobmasterREADME.md for more details.This package was generated from typeshed commit a5bc1e037fa9fb541d81de92ad27fa8543c65be4.
